tasks.prompt: Update format_csv_row so it joins values with ';' instead of ','. Keep the rest of the module unchanged.
tasks.repair_prompt: The behavior is correct. Now introduce a module-level constant named CSV_SEPARATOR with the value ';' and use that constant from format_csv_row. Do not modify slugify, build_preview, or build_profile_url.

tasks.task_family: add a helper function and update call site
tasks.prompt: Make build_preview collapse repeated internal whitespace before trimming and truncating. Add a helper function if needed.
tasks.repair_prompt: Please add a dedicated helper named collapse_spaces and call it from build_preview instead of inlining the whitespace-normalization logic.

tasks.prompt: Make build_profile_url URL-encode the username using the Python standard library so spaces and slashes are escaped in the path segment.
tasks.repair_prompt: Preserve the public function signature, but move the quoting into a helper named safe_path_segment and call that helper from build_profile_url.

tasks.prompt: Update subtotal so items with a negative quantity are ignored instead of reducing the total.
tasks.repair_prompt: Keep the public signatures unchanged, but extract the per-item calculation into a helper named _line_total and call that helper from subtotal.

tasks.prompt: Make apply_discount accept discount codes case-insensitively and ignore surrounding whitespace.
tasks.repair_prompt: Keep the call sites untouched, but move the normalization into a helper named normalize_discount_code and call that helper from apply_discount.

tasks.prompt: Add a helper named format_total to pricing.py that formats cents as a Euro string like '€12.34', and update quote_order to use it for the display field.
tasks.repair_prompt: Keep the formatting logic in the new helper and only wire quote_order to that helper. Do not duplicate the formatting code in service.py.

tasks.prompt: Add a helper named inventory_badge in models.py that returns '[IN]' for in-stock items and '[OUT]' for sold-out items. Update render_card to include that badge before the product name.
tasks.repair_prompt: Keep stock_label available for other callers and introduce the new helper only for the card rendering path.

tasks.prompt: Rewrite price_label so whole-euro values render without a decimal fraction, e.g. 1200 -> '€12', while other values still keep two decimals.
tasks.repair_prompt: Preserve the function signature, keep the change inside price_label, and make the whole-euro branch use a local euros variable.

tasks.task_family: fix a failing behavior described in text
tasks.prompt: Change render_card so the stock status appears on a second line instead of inside parentheses, while keeping the price on the first line.
tasks.repair_prompt: Do not touch models.py. This is a rendering-only change in view.py, and the second line should come from a helper named render_status_line.

tasks.prompt: Update build_subject so it starts with 'Report: ' instead of 'report: '.
tasks.repair_prompt: Keep the change local to build_subject, but introduce a SUBJECT_PREFIX constant and use it from the function.

tasks.prompt: Make build_body trim surrounding whitespace from user_name and title-case it before building the greeting.
tasks.repair_prompt: Preserve the function signature, keep the change local to build_body, and store the cleaned display name in a local variable named display_name.

tasks.prompt: Rewrite render_digest so it returns one bullet per item using '- ' prefixes and returns 'No updates.' when the list is empty.
tasks.repair_prompt: Please keep the render_digest function name and signature exactly as they are, and use an explicit early return for the empty-list case.
